Date:   Wed Apr 29 01:07:49 2026 -0400

    test(frontend): migrate TC-002/003/005/007 to fixture node/project route [ddx-0724aaba]
    
    Rewrite TC-002, TC-003, TC-005, and TC-007 in e2e/app.spec.ts to navigate
    the live Go-server fixture harness under
    /nodes/<fixture-node-id>/projects/<fixture-project-id>/... instead of
    the removed top-level /documents, /beads, /agent, and / routes.
    
    A new getFixtureIds() helper resolves the harness-derived node and
    project IDs at runtime by querying GraphQL nodeInfo and /api/projects,
    filtering for the ddx-e2e-* tmp workspace so persisted developer-local
    projects in server-state.json are not used.
    
    - TC-002 asserts the project-scoped Documents page chrome and empty
      state for the fixture (sample.md is intentionally a plain markdown
      file with no doc-id frontmatter, so the docgraph-backed Documents
      query returns 0 entries).
    - TC-003 asserts the new filterable beads table against the seeded
      fx-001..fx-004 beads, including search debounce, status-chip
      filtering, row-click detail navigation, and the new bead form.
    - TC-005 asserts the project-scoped Sessions page (replaces the
      removed top-level /agent run UI) renders empty against the fixture.
    - TC-007 asserts the project-scoped sidebar exposes Beads, Documents,
      Graph, Sessions, and Personas links and that SPA navigation between
      them and back to the project home works.
    
    Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

113	// Fixture discovery — TC-002/003/005/007 navigate the live Go-server fixture
114	// harness and assert against the seeded documents/beads/personas/graph data.
115	// The harness derives node and project IDs from the temp workspace path so
116	// the IDs are stable per run but not predictable; resolve them at runtime
117	// from /api/projects + the GraphQL nodeInfo query.
118	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
119	async function getFixtureIds(
120	  request: import('@playwright/test').APIRequestContext
121	): Promise<{ nodeId: string; projectId: string; nodeName: string }> {
122	  const nodeResp = await request.post('/graphql', {
123	    data: { query: '{ nodeInfo { id name } }' }
124	  })
125	  const nodeBody = (await nodeResp.json()) as {
126	    data: { nodeInfo: { id: string; name: string } }
127	  }
128	  const projectsResp = await request.get('/api/projects')
129	  const projects = (await projectsResp.json()) as Array<{
130	    id: string
131	    name: string
132	    path: string
133	  }>
134	  // The fixture harness boots ddx-server from a `mktemp -d -t ddx-e2e-XXXXXX`
135	  // workspace, so the fixture project's path/name is prefixed `ddx-e2e-`.
136	  // Other entries in /api/projects (carried over in the developer's persisted
137	  // server state) must not be picked up here — those would point the spec at
138	  // unrelated, developer-local data.
139	  const fixture = projects.find((p) => /(^|\/)ddx-e2e-/.test(p.path) || /^ddx-e2e-/.test(p.name))
140	  if (!fixture) {
141	    throw new Error(
142	      `fixture server has no ddx-e2e-* project registered (got: ${projects
143	        .map((p) => p.id)
144	        .join(', ')})`
145	    )
146	  }
147	  return {
148	    nodeId: nodeBody.data.nodeInfo.id,
149	    projectId: fixture.id,
150	    nodeName: nodeBody.data.nodeInfo.name
151	  }
152	}

1	import { defineConfig } from '@playwright/test';
2	import path from 'node:path';
3	import { fileURLToPath } from 'node:url';
4	
5	const __dirname = path.dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url));
6	
7	// The default Playwright harness boots the Go DDx server against a temp copy
8	// of e2e/fixtures/ so the API endpoints exercised by TC-008 (and other
9	// backend-dependent specs) return real data without reading the developer's
10	// $HOME or the repository's live .ddx/ state.
11	
12	const CLI_PKG_DIR = path.resolve(__dirname, '../../..');
13	const FIXTURE_DIR = path.resolve(__dirname, 'e2e/fixtures');
14	const PORT = Number(process.env.DDX_E2E_PORT ?? 4174);
15	const BASE_URL = `https://127.0.0.1:${PORT}`;
16	
17	// Copy the fixture workspace into a fresh temp dir, build the ddx binary from
18	// the cli module, and exec it from the temp dir. The temp dir has no .git so
19	// FindProjectRoot falls back to it, and tsnet is disabled so the harness has
20	// no Tailscale dependency.
21	const bootCommand = [

# Playwright e2e fixture workspace

This directory provides a self-contained DDx workspace that the default
Playwright harness copies into a temp directory before booting the Go DDx
server. The fixture isolates e2e runs from the developer's home directory and
from the repository's live `.ddx/` state.

Contents:

- `.ddx/config.yaml` — minimal DDx config pointing at the local plugin library.
- `.ddx/beads.jsonl` — open, closed, and blocked beads so the bead API endpoints
  return non-empty data.
- `.ddx/plugins/ddx/` — minimal personas, prompts, and templates so the document
  and persona endpoints have something to list.
- `docs/` — small docs library for the document graph endpoint.

The fixture is read-only; the harness copies it to a `mktemp -d` workspace at
boot so test runs do not mutate these files. Do not reference user-home paths
from anything in this directory.
